sinks.expression: wp_send_json_error( esc_html__( 'Sorry you are not allowed to do this.', 'cookiebot' ), 401 )

wp_remote_post(
			$this->api_url,
			array(
				'headers'     => array(
					'Content-Type' => 'application/json; charset=utf-8',
				),
				'method'      => 'POST',
				'timeout'     => 45,
				'redirection' => 5,
				'httpversion' => '1.0',
				'blocking'    => false,
				'body'        => wp_json_encode( $data ),
				'cookies'     => array(),
			)
		)
wp_die( esc_html__( 'You do not have permission to manage network options.', 'cookiebot' ), 403 )
wp_send_json_error( array( 'message' => __( 'You do not have permission to activate plugins.', 'cookiebot' ) ), 403 )
wp_send_json_error( array( 'message' => __( 'You do not have permission to install plugins.', 'cookiebot' ) ), 403 )

printf( // translators: the placeholder strings denote the positions of , , and HTML tags esc_html__( 'If you want to show the cookie declaration in a specific language, you can add the %1$s"lang"%2$s attribute, e.g. %3$s[cookie_declaration lang="de"]%4$s.', 'cookiebot' ), '', '', '', '' )
